title: 7 herbal teas for itchy eyes relief in allergists' clinic
description: Calendula officinalis teas have been used for centuries to soothe itchy eyes due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The tea contains flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and ease redness. Additionally, calendula contains triterpenoids and saponins, which have antimicrobial properties that help fight off infections that can cause itchy eyes.
